title: List of artificial intelligence companies - Wikipedia
text: Jump to content Search List of artificial intelligence companies 6 languages বাংলা Français 한국어 Português Română Türkçe Edit links From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia This is a dynamic list and may never be able to satisfy particular standards for completeness. You can help by editing the page to add missing items, with references to reliable sources . Below is a list of notable companies that primarily focus on artificial intelligence ( AI ). Companies that simply make use of AI but have a different primary focus are not included.
